title: Smoother Blocks
body:
**Adds new ~extra smooth~ block variants for those that hate the block boarders <3**
  
![All blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fd61d558449b5c360a1979ef8b0825c129ed008.png)

![all smooth slabs and stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f92836503b141b88fa11cb2ff27588dd32414c8c.png)

- Smoother copper
- Smooth polished andesite
- Smooth polished deepslate
- Smooth polished diorite
- Smooth polished granite
- Smooth polished tuff
- Smoother stone
- Smooth weathered copper
- Smooth oxidized copper
- Smooth netherite
- Smooth iron
- Smooth gold
- Smooth exposed copper
- Smooth emerald block
- Smooth diamond block
- Smooth polished blackstone
- Smooth Lapis
- Smooth Redstone
- Smooth polished andesite slab
- Smooth polished andesite stairs 
- Smooth polished granite slab
- Smooth polished granite stairs
- Smooth polished deepslate slab
- Smooth polished deepslate stairs
- Smooth polished diorite slab
- Smooth polished diorite stairs
- Smooth polished blackstone slab
- Smooth polished blackstone stairs
  
Made with MCreator :)
